ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "frequent_traveler_program_id" TEXT /* ID of the frequent traveler program */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the passenger */,
  "is_subscribe_newsletter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger subscribes to the company's newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., First, Business, Economy) */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "departure" TEXT /* Departure location */,
  "arrival" TEXT /* Arrival location */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Booking reference number */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the ticket */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the ticket */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule associated with the ticket */,
  "check_in_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the passenger has checked in */,
  "baggage_weight" REAL /* Weight of the baggage, if applicable */,
  "baggage_type" TEXT /* Type of baggage (e.g., checked, carry-on) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, parent, spouse) */,
  "relation_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  "relation_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relations_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel history record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with this travel */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "departure" TEXT /* Departure location */,
  "arrival" TEXT /* Arrival location */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the travel */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule associated with the travel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger checked out */,
  "travel_status" TEXT /* Status of the travel (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger making the payment */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card used for payment (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Encrypted card number */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger providing feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the passenger */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport mode for which the feedback is provided */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with the feedback */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback or complaint has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_travel_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport mode (e.g., Flight, Train) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport mode */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the transport mode */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the transport mode */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport mode for this route */,
  "departure" TEXT /* Departure location of the route */,
  "arrival" TEXT /* Arrival location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the route in hours */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the schedule belongs to */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time for the schedule */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time for the schedule */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of operation for the schedule (e.g., Mon-Fri) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., driver, attendant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was terminated, if applicable */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_schedule" (
  "staff_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff schedule entry */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the staff member is assigned to */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the staff member is assigned */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the staff member's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the staff member's shift */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the staff schedule (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_schedule_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_schedule_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger receiving the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., delay, cancellation) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been read by the passenger */,
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport mode for which the alert is relevant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_travel_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport mode for which the review is provided */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with the review */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_travel_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id")
)
